description: §19.3.3 E-ERROR-009 — `fail` names a variant (`Nonexistent`) that is NOT a variant of the function's declared error enum (`MyError` has only NotFound/Timeout). Fires E-ERROR-009 AS an error (§34 fatal partition). Incidental W-DEAD-FUNCTION/W-PROGRAM-001 ignored by superset matching.
rationale: §19.3.3: the variant specified in a `fail` statement SHALL be a valid variant of the declared error enum type; an undeclared variant SHALL be a compile error (E-ERROR-009).
